jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Divi's Laboratories
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? Divi's Laboratories in Indore offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Divi's Laboratories:
Divi's Laboratories is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Divi's Laboratories!
